hero.badge: Inference na AI na Turai Mai Cin Gashin Kai
hero.title: Ababen more rayuwa masu cin gashin kai
hero.lead: Mun yi imanin cewa tafiyar da manyan model masu iyawa a kan na'urorin da kake da su tuni — a cikin ƙananan cibiyoyi masu inganci — ita ce hanyar da ƙananan da matsakaitan sana'o'in Turai za su yi gogayya da tunanin hyperscaler da ke mamaye harkar fasahar duniya a yau.
hero.subcopy: Mutanen Turai ne suka ƙirƙire shi, don mutanen Turai.

intent.title: Dalilin Samuwar Helexa
intent.p1: A yau, manyan datacentre na hyperscale ne suka mamaye ababen more rayuwar AI — waɗanda ko dai suna nan a zahiri a ƙasashen da ke wajen Tarayyar Turai (EU), ko kuma suna ƙarƙashin ikon kamfanoni da ke da alhaki ga hukumomin da ke wajen EU — masu manufofi, ɗabi'u da dabaru waɗanda ba kullum suke cika manyan ƙa'idojin ɗa'a da kariyar masu amfani na Turai ba. Kasuwancin Turai na ƙara buƙatar sarrafawa da kare bayanai a cikin tsarin dokokin EU — abin da tsarukan inference na waje ba kasafai suke ba fifiko ba.
intent.p2Intro: Helexa tana amfani da ababen more rayuwar da Turai ke da su tuni, da kuma model na open-weight da ba za mu iya rasa su ba:
intent.bullet1: Manyan model na open-weight suna aiki yadda ya kamata a kan accelerator na kasuwa, na ƙwararru da na matakin datacentre.
intent.bullet2: Zaman bayanai a wuri da kuma sirri tun daga farko. Inference yana gudana a kan ababen more rayuwa da ke cikin yankin hukumar mai amfani.
intent.bullet3: Amfani da ƙarfin accelerator da ake da shi yanzu ba tare da rage inganci ba.
intent.bullet4: Yancin kai daga hyperscaler na duniya masu manufofi masu karo da juna.
intent.closing: Ba wani girgije na duniya da kawai yake da datacentre a EU ba. Masu gudanarwa da yawa na EU, masu zaman kansu da cin gashin kai.

whyNow.title: Me Ya Sa Yanzu
whyNow.problemBullet1: Tsarukan inference na yau suna ɗauka cewa akwai manyan datacentre na hyperscale, manyan rukunin GPU da LLM na rufaffen tushe.
whyNow.problemBullet2: Dokokin Turai — GDPR, AI Act, ƙa'idojin sassa — suna karkatar da ayyuka zuwa cikin gida da cikin yanki.
whyNow.problemBullet3: Aika bayanai zuwa girgijen ƙasashen waje haɗari ne ta fuskar doka, sirri da kuɗi.
whyNow.problemBullet4: Samun GPU ta girgije yana da tsada, yana da ƙarancin wadata, kuma ana sarrafa shi daga wani wuri.
whyNow.problemBullet5: Na'urori masu ƙarfi na kasuwa da na workstation sun riga sun kasance a faɗin Turai ba tare da cikakken amfani ba.
whyNow.opportunityIntro: Model na open-weight masu kusan kaiwa matakin gaba yanzu suna aiki sosai a kan na'urorin da Turai ke da su tuni.
whyNow.opportunityBullet1: Manyan model na open-weight suna aiki a kan workstation da GPU na kasuwa ba tare da rukunin GPU na datacentre ba.
whyNow.opportunityBullet2: Kasuwancin Turai suna son AI da za su iya tafiyarwa a cikin gida, tare da tsayayyen farashi da tabbacin samu a nan gaba.
whyNow.opportunityBullet3: Masu gudanarwa masu na'urori masu ƙarfi za su iya bayar da inference kusa da masu amfani.
whyNow.opportunityBullet4: Doka tana mayar da ikon mallakar bayanai daga zaɓi zuwa wajibi.
whyNow.opportunityBullet5: Software na inference mai inganci shi ne matakin da ya ɓace, kuma maganin ƙarin manyan datacentre.
whyNow.opportunityClosing: Helexa ita ce wannan matakin software.

operators.title: Tafiyar da manyan model a kan na'urorinka.
operators.body: Helexa tana hidimar model na open-weight masu kusan matakin gaba a kan GPU na kasuwa da na matakin workstation, a wurin aikinka, a cikin yankin hukumarka. Babu cluster, babu hyperscaler, babu dogaro da ƙasashen waje. Bayanai suna zama inda kake iko da su.

routing.title: Buƙatun suna zama kusa da gida.
routing.body: Helexa tana tura kowace buƙata zuwa ababen more rayuwa masu ƙarfin aiki, tana fifita kusancin yanki, don haka zirga-zirga da bayanai su kasance inda kake tsammani. Girke-girke suna haɗuwa su zama babbar hanyar sadarwa yayin da ƙarfi ke ƙaruwa.

value.title: An tabbatar da aiki. Tattalin arziki a fili yake.
value.body: Ana auna amfani a fili, kuma za a biya masu gudanarwa masu zaman kansu saboda basirar da suke bayarwa. Babu harajin dandali, babu lissafin kuɗi maras tsabta, babu kulle-kulle.

principles.title: An Gina Kan Cin Gashin Kai, Ba Kulle Ba

distributed.title: Mai Cin Gashin Kai Tun Daga Ƙira
distributed.body: Na'urorin Turai, masu gudanarwar Turai, dokar Turai. Babu wani wuri guda da zai iya kawo faɗuwar komai, kuma babu wata hukuma ta waje da samun aiki ya dogara da ita.

participation.title: Yana Aiki a Kan Na'urorin da Kake da Su
participation.body: Daga workstation guda zuwa datacentre na yanki, kwamfuta mai ƙarfi na iya tafiyar da Helexa. Yana rage buƙatun ababen more rayuwa maimakon neman sabbin cluster.

fairness.title: Sirri da Bayyana Gaskiya
fairness.body: Sirri tun daga tushe: tarihin hira yana zama a cikin browser kawai, ba a kan sabar ba har abada. Auna amfani a bayyane yake; babu baƙaƙen akwatuna, babu ɓoyayyun kuɗaɗe.

evolving.title: Mai Juriya Ta Hanyar Rarrabuwa
evolving.body: Ƙarfin da aka rarraba a kan girke-girke masu zaman kansu da yawa yana da wuyar tacewa, hanawa ko kashewa, kuma yana jure sauye-sauyen manufofin ƙasashen waje da faɗuwar kamfani guda.

roadAhead.title: Inda Helexa Za Ta Dosa
roadAhead.p1: Burinmu na dogon lokaci shi ne mu zama matakin software da ke tafiyar da rarrabacciyar hanyar sadarwa ta ababen more rayuwar AI na Turai da ake gudanarwa da kansu.
roadAhead.p2: Daga girke-girken kamfanoni da ke tafiyar da manyan model a kan na'urorinsu, zuwa datacentre na yanki masu amfani da makamashi mai sabuntuwa da ke hidimar al'ummominsu.
roadAhead.p3: Matakin inference na Turai mallakar Turai, ana kuma gudanar da shi a Turai. Mai jure katsewa, sauye-sauyen manufofin ƙasashen waje, kamfanoni masu ƙwace kasuwa da faɗuwar kamfani guda.
roadAhead.p4: Ababen more rayuwa da ke ƙarfafa 'yancin kan Turai maimakon zurfafa dogaro da 'yan kaɗan daga masu bayarwa na ƙasashen waje.

card.title: Matakin software na ababen more rayuwar AI na Turai
card.body: Helexa tana matakin farko ne, kuma da gangan. Tsarin inference mai aiki a yau, yana girma zuwa rarrabacciyar hanyar sadarwa ta girke-girken Turai masu zaman kansu.

joinMesh.title: Ababen More Rayuwar AI Masu Cin Gashin Kai.
joinMesh.lead: Ko kana tafiyar da AI a kan na'urorinka, kana sarrafa ƙarfin aiki, ko kuma kana ginawa zuwa ga 'yancin AI na Turai — akwai gurbinka a nan.
joinMesh.ctaRunNode: Girka node (nan ba da jimawa ba)
joinMesh.footer: Babu lambunan katanga. Matakin software na AI na Turai mai cin gashin kai. Daga workstation guda zuwa datacentre na yanki masu amfani da makamashi mai sabuntuwa.
